summaryPatterns: I'm a Senior Node.js Developer with 5+ years of experience, built high-load APIs serving 6M+ users monthly and reduced query response time by 40%
I'm a Backend Developer (4+ years) specializing in microservices architecture, optimized SQL queries by 70% and scaled systems to 250K+ users
I'm a Node.js Developer with 6+ years of experience, designed REST APIs processing 5000+ daily sessions and increased system performance by 10x
I'm a Fullstack Developer (3+ years) focused on Node.js backend, developed platforms handling 1M+ requests and reduced infrastructure costs by 20%
I'm a Senior Backend Engineer with 10+ years of experience, migrated monoliths to microservices and improved response times from 1.5s to 0.7s
achievementPhrases: Reduced query response time by 40% through SQL optimization
Scaled system to handle 250K+ concurrent users
Improved API performance by 10x using caching strategies
Decreased page load time from 1.5s to 0.7s
Optimized database queries resulting in 70-80% faster execution
Reduced infrastructure costs by 37% through API optimization
Increased system throughput by 43% after refactoring
Achieved 85%+ unit test coverage across critical modules
Processed 1M+ data rows with 100+ daily exports using Kafka
Handled 5000+ user sessions daily on e-commerce platform
Reduced deployment time from 5 days to 2 hours
Increased staff engagement by 15% through internal platform features
Decreased support tickets by 25% via automated solutions
Achieved 6.5x performance improvement with low-level database solutions
Managed teams of 10+ developers across multiple projects
keyResponsibilities: Design and develop REST/GraphQL APIs using Node.js and TypeScript
Optimize database queries and implement caching strategies
Integrate with external APIs and third-party services
Write comprehensive unit and integration tests
Conduct code reviews and mentor junior developers
Deploy applications using Docker and Kubernetes
Monitor application performance and troubleshoot issues
Collaborate with frontend teams and stakeholders
redFlags: Listing more than 25 technologies without depth
Using vague phrases like 'developed applications' without metrics
No mention of testing practices or code quality
Missing database optimization or performance improvements
No experience with modern deployment practices
Lack of collaboration or team leadership experience
Only focusing on frontend technologies for backend role
notes: Backend разработчики Node.js должны демонстрировать глубокие знания серверных технологий, оптимизации баз данных и архитектуры высоконагруженных систем. Ключевые требования: опыт работы с TypeScript, знание паттернов микросервисов, умение оптимизировать производительность API и базы данных. Важно показать опыт работы с различными СУБД (PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis), брокерами сообщений (Kafka, RabbitMQ) и современными DevOps практиками. Сильные кандидаты указывают конкретные метрики улучшения производительности, опыт масштабирования систем и работы в команде. Обязательно наличие опыта тестирования и code review. Финтех и e-commerce проекты особенно ценятся из-за требований к надежности и производительности.
